label: 1 feature - Complexity

candidate_validation.label: 1 feature - Complexity
candidate_validation.description: Modello minimale a una sola feature. Serve a capire quanto spiega da sola la feature di complessita' piu' robusta disponibile.
candidate_validation.validation_note: Fixed-feature model evaluated with GroupKFold and LOOCV. If features were chosen from the current full dataset, interpret as exploratory.

nested_cv.debug_note: fold_details contains train/test patients, selected features, fold coefficients and patient-level predicted probabilities. Use it to verify whether identical AUC values across pruning thresholds come from identical rankings or from different models with the same fold-wise ordering.

validation_summary.note: These are validation metrics. The final model is trained on all available patients only after validation is complete.

warning: apparent_training_auc is optimistic because the model is trained and evaluated on all available patients. Use GroupKFold, LOOCV and permutation results for validation.
